pi_items.source: Task description specifies classification logic. Verifier checks 'profit_tier' (case-insensitive) in DVA archive text. This is a CASE WHEN expression that references another calculated column (Profit_Per_Unit), which must be created first.
Task description specifies formula. Verifier checks 'total_cost_ratio' (case-insensitive) in DVA archive text.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses sample_order_lines2023.xlsx (synthetic Tableau Superstore data, 9000 rows, 20 columns) located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\OracleAnalyticsData\. The dataset column names are exactly: 'Profit', 'Quantity Ordered', 'Sales', 'Shipping Cost', 'Discount', 'Product Category', 'Product Sub Category', 'Customer Segment', 'Ship Mode' (NOTE: no 'Revenue' or 'Region' column exists). The agent must create three calculated columns: Profit_Per_Unit (Profit/Quantity Ordered), Profit_Tier (CASE WHEN classification referencing Profit_Per_Unit: >20='High Margin', >0='Low Margin', else='Loss Making'), and Total_Cost_Ratio ((Shipping Cost+Discount)/Sales*100). Expected Profit_Tier distribution: Furniture has 21% High/28% Low/51% Loss; Office Supplies has 12% High/39% Low/49% Loss; Technology has 33% High/27% Low/40% Loss. For the combo chart sorted descending by Total_Cost_Ratio, the top sub-categories are: Appliances (17.5%), Paper (14.0%), Storage & Organization (13.4%), Office Furnishings (13.2%), Tables (12.9%). For the pivot table (avg Profit_Per_Unit), cells that should be RED (negative): Consumer x Delivery Truck (-28.57), Consumer x Regular Air (-3.59), Home Office x Delivery Truck (-24.46), Small Business x Delivery Truck (-31.38). All other cells are positive (GREEN). The workbook must be saved as 'unit_economics.dva' to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\. The three canvases must be named exactly 'Unit Profitability', 'Cost Structure', and 'Segment Efficiency'. Canvas 1 requires a 100% Stacked Bar chart titled 'Order Profitability Distribution by Category'. Canvas 2 requires a Combo chart (bars=avg Total_Cost_Ratio, line=avg Profit on secondary axis) titled 'Cost Burden vs Profitability by Sub-Category'. Canvas 3 requires a Pivot Table with conditional formatting (red negative, green positive) titled 'Unit Profit by Segment and Shipping Mode'.
